title: Water Generators
description: A mod that adds a lot of simple FE generators.
body:
# Water Generators(English)

A simple generator module with several series of FE added. Under basic circumstances, there are only a few machines in each series.

## Now there are:

1. Turbogenerator:
Place water blocks above the blocks to generate electricity. (Power generation=height of water blocks above the generator * basic power generation)

2. Liquid generator:
Consume liquid to generate electricity. (Power generation=fluid consumption/amount of liquid required to generate energy once * basic power generation * liquid rate)

- Water generator:
Consuming water for power generation has a higher liquid rate and a smaller amount of liquid required to generate energy for one cycle compared to liquid generators.

- Steam generator:
Consuming steam for power generation is superior to hydroelectric generators.

3. Vaporizer:
Used for producing steam. (1mB steam=1mB water+2FE)

## Linkage
The module links [TF] Thermal Foundation, [TD] Thermal Dynamics, and [EIO] Final Image Interface
(End IO), relevant generators have been added.

[TD] Thermal Dynamics provides synthetic materials for [TF] Thermal Foundation generators, and it is recommended to add both simultaneously. (Shouldn't anyone add these two modules at the same time?)

The characteristics of the generator in this module are easy to generate electricity, high power output, synthetic nesting, and no guarantee of balance.

# 水发电机（中文）

一个添加了几系列 FE 的简单的发电机的模组。基础情况下每个系列机器只有几个。

## 现在有：

1.涡轮发电机：
在方块上方放置水方块发电。（发电量=发电机上方的水方块的高度 * 基础发电量）

2.液体发电机：
消耗 液体 发电。（发电量=流体消耗量 / 产生1次能量所需的液体量 * 基础发电量 * 液体倍率）

- 水发电机：
消耗 水 发电，比 液体发电机 有 较大的液体倍率 和 更小的产生1次能量所需的液体量。

- 蒸汽发电机：
消耗 蒸汽 发电，比 水发电机 更优秀。

3.汽化机：
用于生产蒸汽。（1mB蒸汽=1mB水+2FE）

## 联动
模组联动了 [TF] 热力基本 (Thermal Foundation) ， [TD] 热动力学 (Thermal Dynamics) ， [EIO] 末影接口
(Ender IO) ，增加了相关的发电机。

[TD] 热动力学 (Thermal Dynamics) 为 [TF] 热力基本 (Thermal Foundation) 的发电机提供合成材料，两者建议同时添加。 （应该没有人不同时添加这两个模组吧？）

本模组的发电机的特点：发电容易，发电量高，合成套娃,不保证平衡性。
